nasb.text: We utterly destroyed them, as we did to Sihon king of Heshbon, utterly destroying the men, women and children of every city.

esv.text: And we devoted them to destruction, as we did to Sihon the king of Heshbon, devoting to destruction every city, men, women, and children.

cnv.text: 我們把這些都滅盡，像從前我們待希實本王西宏一樣，把各城中的男女和小孩子都滅盡。

ccb.text: 像对付希实本王西宏一样，我们将这些城邑夷为平地，城中的男女老幼一个不留，
